name: Black Forest Cheesecake Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar. Mix until well blended using an electric mixer on medium speed.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Blend in chocolate and almond extract.
6. Pour the mixture over the crust.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; let it cool before removing the rim of the pan.
9. Chill completely.
10. Just before serving, top the cheesecake with cherry pie filling and whipped topping.
